text: Office pantry mein unhe mere accent ka mazaak udate suna toh dil baith gaya, par mere paas rone ka waqt nahi hai kyunki mujhe login karke bacchon ki school fees ke liye extra shift lagani hai. Widowed hone ke baad samaj pehle hi ungli uthata hai, isliye main bas apna sar jhuka kar kaam karti hoon kyunki mera rukna poore khandaan ki 'izzat' ke liye khatra hai. Thakan se sharir toot raha hai, par 'farz' nibhane ke liye mujhe har haal mein bas machine ki tarah chalte rehna hai.

Mera accent unke liye joke hai, par mere liye ye meri din-raat ki mehnat ka nishaan hai jo main bacchon ki parvarish aur unhe community exclusion se bachane ke liye kar rahi hoon. IT sector mein itna competition hai ki main rona afford nahi kar sakti, bas ek machine ki tarah kaam kiye ja rahi hoon kyunki mujh par poore khandaan ki zimmedari hai. Main thak kar choor hoon par mera 'farz' mujhe sone nahi deta, bas endurance hi meri majboori hai.

Colleague ke tano ke baad dil kiya ki laptop band kar doon, par phir yaad aaya ki home loan ki kist baki hai aur divorcee hone ke baad 'log kya kahenge' ka darr hamesha rehta hai. Main apni insult bhool kar bas bacchon ki schooling aur unki izzat ke liye client deadlines poori karne mein lagi hoon. Mere liye mental health ek luxury hai jo main abhi afford nahi kar sakti, bas endurance hi meri pehchaan ban gayi hai.

Accent ka mazaak sunkar laga ki shayad main is corporate shehar ke kabil nahi, par phir bacchon ka chehra yaad aa gaya jinke liye mujhe 'izzat' se rehna hai. Single mother hone ke naate mujhe double mehnat karni padti hai taaki koi ye na kahe ki divorced hone ki wajah se main nakamyab hoon. Thak kar choor ho chuki hoon, par 'structural endurance' hi mera sahara hai kyunki rukkna mere liye option hi nahi hai.

Logon ke mazak aur community exclusion ne mujhe tod diya hai, par bacchon ki schooling ke liye main har din double shift karti hoon. Samaj mein ek galti bhi 'divorce stigma' ko badha deti hai, isliye main thakan mein bhi har 'duty' nibhati hoon taaki koi ungli na utha sake. Mera sharir bol raha hai ki ruk jao, par mera 'farz' kehta hai ki main afford nahi kar sakti ki bacchon ko koi financial kami mehsus ho.
